---
title: "Software & Apps | Zhang Lab | University of Kentucky"
output:
  html_document:
    includes:
      in_header:
        - includes/site-head.html
        - includes/head/software.html
---

<section class="page-hero" aria-labelledby="software-title">
<div class="site-shell narrow-copy">
<p class="eyebrow">Software &amp; apps</p>
<h1 id="software-title">Open tools for practical biomedical analysis.</h1>
<p class="page-lede">Explore the lab's public R packages and Shiny applications. Each project links directly to its current source repository and, where available, its public distribution or hosted application.</p>
</div>
</section>

<section class="section" aria-labelledby="cytokine-tools">
<div class="site-shell">
<div class="section-heading">
<p class="eyebrow">Cytokine analysis</p>
<h2 id="cytokine-tools">Cytokine profiling tools</h2>
</div>
<div class="software-grid">
<article class="software-card">
<div class="software-card-top">
<p class="tool-type">R package</p>
<span class="status-tag">CRAN</span>
</div>
<h3>CytoProfile</h3>
<p>Lab-linked R package for cytokine-data quality control, exploratory analysis, univariate testing, and multivariate workflows.</p>
<div class="link-row">
<a class="text-link" href="https://github.com/saraswatsh/CytoProfile" target="_blank" rel="noopener">GitHub <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
<a class="text-link" href="https://cran.r-project.org/package=CytoProfile" target="_blank" rel="noopener">CRAN <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
<a class="text-link" href="https://cytoprofile.cytokineprofile.org/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Documentation <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
</div>
</article>
<article class="software-card">
<div class="software-card-top">
<p class="tool-type">Shiny application</p>
<span class="status-tag">Web app</span>
</div>
<h3>CytokineProfile Shiny</h3>
<p>A guided cytokine-analysis application covering data upload, filtering, transformations, statistical analyses, interactive results, and exports.</p>
<div class="link-row">
<a class="text-link" href="https://github.com/ZhangLabUKY/CytokineProfileShinyApp" target="_blank" rel="noopener">GitHub <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
<a class="text-link" href="https://shiny.cytokineprofile.org" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open app <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
</div>
</article>
</div>
</div>
</section>

<section class="section section-muted" aria-labelledby="cgm-tools">
<div class="site-shell">
<div class="section-heading">
<p class="eyebrow">Glucose monitoring</p>
<h2 id="cgm-tools">CGM analysis tools</h2>
</div>
<div class="software-grid">
<article class="software-card">
<div class="software-card-top">
<p class="tool-type">R package</p>
<span class="status-tag">CRAN</span>
</div>
<h3>imputeCGM</h3>
<p>Imputes missing continuous-glucose-monitoring values, including both explicit missing values and readings absent from the expected timestamp grid.</p>
<p class="software-note">Repository name: <code>imputeCGMR</code>.</p>
<div class="link-row">
<a class="text-link" href="https://github.com/ZhangLabUKY/imputeCGMR" target="_blank" rel="noopener">GitHub <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
<a class="text-link" href="https://cran.r-project.org/package=imputeCGM" target="_blank" rel="noopener">CRAN <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
</div>
</article>
<article class="software-card">
<div class="software-card-top">
<p class="tool-type">Python package</p>
<span class="status-tag">PyPI</span>
</div>
<h3>imputeCGM (Python)</h3>
<p>A Python package for imputing missing continuous-glucose-monitoring values.</p>
<div class="link-row">
<a class="text-link" href="https://pypi.org/project/imputeCGM/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">PyPI <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
</div>
</article>
<article class="software-card">
<div class="software-card-top">
<p class="tool-type">Shiny application</p>
<span class="status-tag">Research tool</span>
</div>
<h3>IAHRiskCalc</h3>
<p>Classifies clamp-based impaired awareness of hypoglycemia from symptom and physiological-response values at 45 and 90 mg/dL.</p>
<div class="link-row">
<a class="text-link" href="https://github.com/ZhangLabUKY/IAHRiskCalc" target="_blank" rel="noopener">GitHub <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
</div>
</article>
<article class="software-card">
<div class="software-card-top">
<p class="tool-type">Shiny application</p>
<span class="status-tag">Research tool</span>
</div>
<h3>CGManalyzer2</h3>
<p>An interactive application for CGM data quality review, missingness, glucose metrics, visualizations, complexity analyses, and reproducible exports.</p>
<p class="software-note">Repository name: <code>CGMAnalyzerShiny</code>.</p>
<div class="link-row">
<a class="text-link" href="https://github.com/ZhangLabUKY/CGMAnalyzerShiny" target="_blank" rel="noopener">GitHub <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
</div>
</article>
</div>
</div>
</section>
